highlights.text: Serial code MY-005 | TRAGUIN tour code TRG-MAL-LUX-2026
Country: Malaysia, Asia | Category: Luxury Malaysia Discovery
Vehicle / Meals: Private Luxury Van / Buffet Breakfast & Curated Dinners

itinerary.title: Malaysia Luxury Tour
itinerary.overview:
06 Nights / 07 Days Ultimate Luxury Malaysia Discovery SERIAL CODE: MY-005 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-MAL-LUX-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Malaysia CATEGORY: Luxury Malaysia Discovery DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days DESTINATIONS: Kuala Lumpur (2N) + Cameron Highlands (2N) + Langkawi (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Indulge in a journey of pure elegance with this TRAGUIN curated luxury Malaysia tour. From the soaring skyscrapers of Kuala Lumpur to the misty tea plantations of Cameron Highlands and the pristine beaches of Langkawi, this luxury Malaysia holiday promises unforgettable memories. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days Malaysia package (MY-005 / TRG-MAL-LUX-2026): Kuala Lumpur (2N) + with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 02: KUALA LUMPUR TO CAMERON HIGHLANDS

days.title: ARRIVAL IN KUALA LUMPUR
days.description: Arrive in style with our VIP meet-and-greet service. Your TRAGUIN private chauffeur will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a panoramic evening tour of iconic attractions including the Petronas Towers.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: KUALA LUMPUR TO CAMERON HIGHLANDS
days.description: Transfer to the cool, breezy Cameron Highlands. Enjoy breathtaking landscapes as we move from the city to the lush green tea plantations. A premium stay awaits in this highland sanctuary.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: CAMERON HIGHLANDS EXPLORATION
days.description: A day of curated experiences: visit tea factories, mossy forests, and strawberry farms. Immerse yourself in the scenic beauty of the highlands.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLY TO LANGKAWI
days.description: Take a private charter or premium flight to Langkawi. Check into your luxury beachfront villa and prepare for an exclusive experience on this pristine island.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LANGKAWI ISLAND LUXURY
days.description: Explore Langkawi's iconic attractions, including the SkyBridge and mangrove forests. Enjoy sunset cocktails on a private yacht—one of our signature exclusive experiences.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LANGKAWI LEISURE
days.description: Unwind at your handpicked hotel, indulge in spa treatments, or enjoy pristine beaches. Reflect on unforgettable memories created during your luxury Malaysia holiday.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final shopping and breakfast before your departure. TRAGUIN ensures a seamless end to your premium journey.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
